title: Officers Guard the Palace
description: Pages 11–15 focus on officers guard the palace, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo's officers defend the palace and the factory while the allies split into fights across the trapped kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gramps!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: "Ten-ton Vice!!!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GyaA AAAAAA AA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: gyahaha, take some of that you bastards !!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: That's the power of our family's officers-!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: HODA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hngh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're not set-ting a single foot past here--!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "Revolver leg!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GyaA AAAA AH~!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We've caught him!! Hurry, get the rope!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Uuugh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Get some medical care too!! They've been shot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, I'm sorry !! Thank you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: My family was going to be killed!! I was so scared...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I was the one who set fire to the town, I'm sorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I stabbed my friend! Dammit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Do not blame yourselves, you were all manipulated at the hands of Doflamingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: One way or another, we're going to end this game....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I know where King Riku is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: He's together with five Star God USOP!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: We're only capturing them. Do not harm them under any circus-stances....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Otherwise, this game will continue until everyone is dead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Let's take King Riku and God usopp prisoner!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: We'll lure them out with our "Captives"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: go, communicate it over the entire country!! Head for the King's Plateau!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Interior

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: GyaA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Hurry and get this sad tank back up and fixed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Do you not want your Princess Manshelly's sickness to get better?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: What the hell was that huge earthquake just now, anyway?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: That is something you need not concerns yourselves with!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Are the people of dressrossa okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Is Green Bit Okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: HAAAHN? SHUT YOUR MOUTH AND WORK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: GyaA AAAAA AA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: HRM?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: That's...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: All you need to worry about is making smile as fast as you can!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Work your asses off you little shits!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Those words...

dialogue.speaker: Senor Pink
dialogue.text: They are pink bees!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Bian!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Inhell!! Wicca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: They noticed!! Bian!!

dialogue.speaker: Senor Pink
dialogue.text: "Pink bees"!! Next words!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Eh? We've been tricked?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: What are they talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Hey, what the hell are you staring off into the distance for?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: All of you, work! Put your backs into it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: About the Princess' sickness?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Doflamingo Tricked us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Text: Fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: I don't know what's going on, but there's one thing I do know!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Friends don't lie!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: You shut your mouth, stupid un- derling...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Brige ehhh!?!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Alright! We got through!!

summary: Officers Guard the Palace develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Doflamingo Family, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
